strengths: 15+ years of deep software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, embedded, cloud, AI agents)
Proven expertise in building scalable systems (handling millions of requests, real-time data, Kubernetes deployments)
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurial experience (founded GISCollective, authored multiple libraries)
concerns: Limited recent AI-specific product/platform experience (only mentions AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq)
No Master's/PhD in AI-related field (only Bachelor's in Computer Science)
Focus appears more engineering-heavy than AI-strategy leadership (no clear AI thought leadership or recognized expertise)
response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional engineering depth and versatility, with demonstrated ability to build complex systems and lead open-source projects. However, his experience leans heavily toward software engineering rather than AI strategy leadership. The recent AI-agent work is promising but lacks the breadth of AI product/platform expertise required for this role.
